title: croton holguinensis
intro: Croton holguinensis, also known as Cuban croton, is a species of plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Croton holguinensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and protecting against oxidative stress. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, or topical creams.
